title: Beta Hotfix Notes - v0.105.1
author: demileaf
contents:
Quick hotfix today addressing several bugs related to the new Aeonglass boss and multiplayer state divergences.

[h3]USER INTERFACE & EXPERIENCE:[/h3]

- Updated the [b]Aeonglass[/b] boss icon

[h3]BUG FIXES:[/h3]

[b]Enemies:[/b]
- Fixed [b]Aeonglass[/b] first move intent showing a buff instead of a debuff
- Fixed [b]Aeonglass[/b] music not playing correctly
- Fixed [b]Ceremonial Beast[/b] background music transition not lining up with when it gets stunned

[b]Multiplayer:[/b]
- Fixed [b]Silken Tress[/b] relic only affecting card rewards for the host
- Fixed state divergence when taking any rewards after a treasure room
- Fixed state divergence after [b]Crystal Sphere[/b] event
